category_sources: source_facts.description says lazygit is a simple terminal UI for git commands.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives lazygit; source_facts.homepage is the official repository with the same project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a terminal UI for git commands; source_facts.executables lists the lazygit CLI.
